---
title: "Submit a Paper"
subtitle: "Suggest a paper to be RECASTed"
toc: false
---

## How it works

1. **You submit** a paper and its replication data using the form below
2. **We review** whether the paper has a clear identification strategy and public replication data
3. **We RECAST it** — replicate, extend with DoubleML or Causal Forest, and run AI peer review
4. **Results appear** on the [Tracker](submissions.qmd) page and, if successful, on the [Papers](papers.qmd) page

### What makes a good candidate?

- A published empirical paper with a clear causal identification strategy (OLS, IV, DID, RDD)
- Publicly available replication data (Stata .dta, CSV, or similar)
- A well-defined treatment variable and outcome
- Ideally N > 100 for Causal Forest, any N for DoubleML

### What we need from you

- A link to the paper (DOI, journal page, or PDF)
- A link to the replication data (Dataverse, journal supplement, GitHub, etc.)
- A brief note on the identification strategy

---

## Submission form

```{=html}
<div style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;">
<p style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;">
  <strong>Google Form coming soon.</strong><br><br>
  In the meantime, email your suggestion to<br>
  <a href="mailto:quentin@thecausalmindset.com">quentin@thecausalmindset.com</a><br><br>
  Include: paper title, authors, journal/year, link to paper, link to replication data, and identification strategy (OLS/IV/DID/RDD).
</p>
</div>
```

<!--
TO ACTIVATE THE GOOGLE FORM:
1. Create a Google Form with these fields:
   - Paper title (short text, required)
   - Authors (short text, required)
   - Journal and year (short text, required)
   - Link to paper (URL, required)
   - Link to replication data (URL, required)
   - Identification strategy (dropdown: OLS / IV / DID / RDD / Other)
   - Brief description of the causal question (paragraph, optional)
   - Your email (short text, optional)
2. Get the embed URL from Google Forms (three dots → Get pre-filled link → Share → Embed)
3. Replace the placeholder above with:
   <iframe src="YOUR_GOOGLE_FORM_EMBED_URL" width="100%" height="900" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>
-->

---

[View the submission tracker →](submissions.qmd)
